name: 21"x43" Solid Outdoor 1pc Chair Cushion Dark Green - Threshold™
description:
Add a soft charm to your seating space with this 1-Piece Solid Outdoor Chair Cushion from Threshold™. Made of 100% recycled polyester material with polyester filling for plush comfort, this chair seat cushion is designed in a green hue for a classic charm. The zipper closure and side ties keep it in a place, while the removable cover offers convenient cleaning. Suitable for outdoor use, this fade-resistant cushion helps your space stay stylish season after season.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
